title: Non GATE CSE - Object Oriented Programming - Software Design

questions.question:
The Object Modelling Technique (OMT) uses the following three kinds of model to describe a system



Object Oriented Programming: UGC NET CSE | December 2012 | Part 3 | Question: 54
options: Class Model , Object Model and Analysis Model
Object Model, Dynamic Model and Functional Model
Class Model, Dynamic Model and Functional Model
Object Model, Analysis Model and Dynamic Model
questions.correct_answer: Object Model, Dynamic Model and Functional Model
